title: But a Memory
shortDescription: A dreamlike island with a solitary cliffside house, where wanderers find deep peace before mysteriously moving on.
atmosphere: Serene and melancholic, filled with gentle ocean sounds and the ethereal feel of a cherished, fading memory.
tips: Just rest and let the tranquility settle — every visitor eventually falls asleep and wakes somewhere else.

title: Fallout Shelter
shortDescription: A vast underground bunker of radiation zones, anomalous computers and scattered weapons, torn by faction conflicts.
atmosphere: Decaying concrete tunnels of murky pipes and heavy blast doors, radiation exposure looming beside armed groups and entities.
tips: Avoid radiation zones — disorientation and spatial anomalies follow. Stay clear of rival faction outposts. Grab protective gear and night vision if found.

title: The Summit
shortDescription: A seemingly endless Everest-like peak with weather that worsens over time, plunging below -180°C.
atmosphere: A desolate alpine climb of escalating blizzards, fog and hail — every entity here eventually dies, leaving only frozen corpses.
tips: Avoid the tents — hostile entities live in them. Wear cold-weather gear. Weather turns fast: get out within 10 minutes.

title: Motion
shortDescription: A 1930s stop-motion town of an Almond Water fountain, endless grassy hills and a floating castle — safe by day, hostile by night.
atmosphere: A whimsical cartoonish town with sinister undertones, its cheerful siren music giving way to total silence and danger after dark.
tips: Never stay outside after nightfall — shelter in buildings. Look for Almond Water. Only approach the Animated King's trial if you're prepared.

title: Toward Agape
shortDescription: An ever-constructing level whose corridors converge on a central point where a machine god assembles something at its core.
atmosphere: Mechanical yet mystical: industrial corridors oriented inward toward an omniscient machine consciousness issuing precise instructions.
tips: The level keeps rebuilding itself. Understanding the machine god's odd theology may be the key to navigating it safely.

title: Solace
shortDescription: An abandoned Levantine mansion offering refuge from conflict, where visitors find peace through familiar sensory memories.
atmosphere: Serene yet melancholic: traditional architecture, dusty rooms and finely patterned windows overlooking distant mountains.
tips: Let the familiar comforts settle you — the carpet, the smell of coffee. This peace comes with a permanent separation from the outside.

title: Lighthouse
shortDescription: A fog-shrouded island holding a ruined lighthouse, home to undead entities and ringed by deep, cold saltwater.
atmosphere: Perpetual night under thick fog and a crescent moon; an isolating quiet broken only by scattered signs of past tragedy.
tips: Avoid the island itself — stay near the boat wreckage. The lighthouse ruins are extremely dangerous; be ready to swim the moment you arrive.

title: Downtown Diner
shortDescription: A looping brick street whose sole destination is a nostalgic diner, haunted by ambiguous entities and echoes of yourself.
atmosphere: Eerie isolation shot through with homesick comfort — yellowed diner light against a barren street full of reflections.
tips: Enter the diner carefully. Approaching the entities triggers blackouts; sit still and the friendly patrons will engage peacefully.

title: Ghoul Town
shortDescription: An orange desert under rust-laden skies and oxidized metal sand, home to peaceful ghouls who speak in sign and grunts.
atmosphere: A permanently orange sky over unbreathable, rust-thick air — humans need oxygen gear to survive here for long.
tips: Bring oxygen tanks the moment you arrive. Ghouls stay passive if treated with respect. Follow the rope path to the settlement for shelter.
